raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding an unauthorized auto-renewal for a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX with Best Buy. 

The service renewed automatically without my authorization. When I contacted customer service to dispute the charge, I was told that I was outside their 90-day refund window and was only offered a partial refund. I did not authorize the renewal and should not be responsible for the charge.

Despite disputing the charge, the account was sent to collections and reported to credit bureaus. This has negatively impacted my credit score.

This account relates to an unauthorized auto-renewal for a XXXX XXXX XXXX . The account appears under a former name that is not my current legal identity. I dispute the accuracy of this reporting and request verification of authorization for the renewal I have spent significant time attempting to resolve this matter through customer service, but representatives have repeatedly stated that nothing can be done beyond a partial refund. 

Because the renewal was unauthorized, I am requesting the following : A full refund of the disputed charge Immediate withdrawal of the account from collections Removal of any negative credit reporting related to this account I believe sending an unauthorized charge to collections and damaging my credit report is unfair and improper. 

I am requesting that Best BuyXXXX XXXX investigate this matter and correct my credit reporting. 

Thank you for your assistance.
